json_data.title: Paging and Segmentation
json_data.reason: This topic directly builds upon early schemes by introducing non-contiguous memory allocation and virtual addressing, which are fundamental to modern operating systems.

json_data.title: Advanced Virtual Memory Management and Page Replacement Algorithms
json_data.reason: This delves into the sophisticated strategies and performance implications of virtual memory, including detailed analysis of various page replacement algorithms and their impact on system performance.

json_data.title: Memory Management for Emerging Non-Volatile Memory (NVM) Architectures
json_data.reason: This research-level topic explores the complex challenges and opportunities of integrating new memory technologies that blur the line between RAM and storage, requiring novel OS and hardware co-design.
